name: Elon Musk
title: CEO, Tesla & SpaceX; founder, xAI
knownFor: World's first trillionaire after the SpaceX IPO; rockets, robotaxis, and posting
source: Forbes Real-Time Billionaires, 2026-07-01 | median: Tesla FY2024 proxy ($57,243)

name: Larry Page
title: Co-founder, Google (Alphabet)
knownFor: Co-invented the search engine that answers everything, including 'who is Larry Page'
source: Forbes Real-Time Billionaires, 2026-07-01 | median: Alphabet FY2025 proxy ($310,826)

name: Sergey Brin
title: Co-founder, Google (Alphabet)
knownFor: Google's other co-founder; back in the building helping steer Alphabet's AI push
source: Forbes Real-Time Billionaires, 2026-07-01 | median: Alphabet FY2025 proxy ($310,826)

name: Jeff Bezos
title: Founder & Executive Chairman, Amazon; co-CEO, Project Prometheus
knownFor: Built the everything store, then left to do rockets and a new AI startup
source: Forbes Real-Time Billionaires, 2026-07-01 | median: Amazon FY2024 proxy ($37,181)

name: Michael Dell
title: Chairman & CEO, Dell Technologies
knownFor: Started selling PCs from a dorm room; the AI-server boom made 'Dude, you're getting a Dell' a $235B punchline

name: Mark Zuckerberg
title: Co-founder & CEO, Meta
knownFor: Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and a famously symbolic $1 salary

name: Larry Ellison
title: Co-founder, Chairman & CTO, Oracle

name: Jensen Huang
title: Co-founder & CEO, Nvidia
knownFor: The leather-jacketed chip chief whose GPUs power the entire AI boom

name: Bernard Arnault

name: Warren Buffett

name: Amancio Ortega

name: Jim Walton
